headline: Assessing Essex Property Trust’s Valuation After Recent Share Price Moves And Mixed Return Performance
summary: Essex Property Trust (ESS) is back on investors’ radar after recent share price moves, with the stock closing at US$255.13. That puts fresh focus on how this West Coast apartment REIT is currently valued. See our latest analysis for Essex Property Trust. Recent moves around US$255 per share come after a relatively steady few months, with a 90 day share price return of 1.16% contrasted against a 1 year total shareholder return decline of 11.49%, suggesting sentiment has cooled after stronger...
